label: Fleck
description: Defines a transient visual effect particle or overlay.

fleckSystemClass.label: Fleck system class
fleckSystemClass.description: C# FleckSystem subclass that drives this fleck's per-tick simulation. Must derive from FleckSystem.

altitudeLayer.label: Altitude layer
altitudeLayer.description: Rendering depth layer that controls draw order relative to terrain, buildings, and pawns.

altitudeLayerIncOffset.label: Altitude layer inc offset
altitudeLayerIncOffset.description: Additional fine-grained altitude offset within the chosen altitude layer.

drawGUIOverlay.label: Draw GUI overlay
drawGUIOverlay.description: If true, the fleck is drawn on the GUI overlay pass rather than the world pass.

graphicData.label: Graphic data
graphicData.description: Primary visual rendering settings. Used when randomGraphics is not set.

randomGraphics.label: Random graphics
randomGraphics.description: List of GraphicData variants. The fleck system picks one at spawn when this list is populated.

realTime.label: Real time
realTime.description: If true, the fleck advances using real wall-clock time instead of game ticks, ignoring time speed.

attachedToHead.label: Attached to head
attachedToHead.description: If true, the fleck tracks the head position of its attached pawn rather than the body root.

useAttachLink.label: Use attach link
useAttachLink.description: If true, the fleck uses an attach-link to follow a moving thing during its lifetime.

fadeInTime.label: Fade in time
fadeInTime.description: Duration in seconds for the fleck to fade from transparent to fully opaque.

solidTime.label: Solid time
solidTime.description: Duration in seconds the fleck remains at full opacity before fading out. Source default 1.

fadeOutTime.label: Fade out time
fadeOutTime.description: Duration in seconds for the fleck to fade from full opacity to transparent.

acceleration.label: Acceleration
acceleration.description: World-space velocity change per second as (x, y, z). Source default is Vector3.zero.

speedPerTime.label: Speed per time
speedPerTime.description: Speed change per second as a FloatRange. Supports both scalar values such as -40 and ranges such as 0.2~0.5.

growthRate.label: Growth rate
growthRate.description: Scale change per second. Positive values grow the fleck; negative values shrink it.

scalers.label: Scalers
scalers.description: List of CurvedScaler entries that animate scale along individual world axes over the fleck lifetime.

collide.label: Collide
collide.description: If true, the fleck system performs terrain collision checks during movement.

landSound.label: Land sound
landSound.description: SoundDef played when the fleck lands after arch motion.

unattachedDrawOffset.label: Unattached draw offset
unattachedDrawOffset.description: World-space draw offset applied when the fleck is not attached to a thing.

attachedDrawOffset.label: Attached draw offset
attachedDrawOffset.description: World-space draw offset applied when the fleck is attached to a thing.

rotateTowardsMoveDirection.label: Rotate towards move direction
rotateTowardsMoveDirection.description: If true, the fleck graphic rotates to face its current movement direction.

rotateTowardsMoveDirectionExtraAngle.label: Rotate towards move direction extra angle
rotateTowardsMoveDirectionExtraAngle.description: Additional rotation in degrees added on top of the movement-direction angle when rotateTowardsMoveDirection is true.

drawOffscreen.label: Draw offscreen
drawOffscreen.description: If true, the fleck is drawn even when outside the visible camera bounds.

archHeight.label: Arch height
archHeight.description: Peak world-unit height of the parabolic arch trajectory as a FloatRange. Supports scalar and range values.

archDuration.label: Arch duration
archDuration.description: Duration in seconds of the parabolic arch trajectory as a FloatRange.

archCurve.label: Arch curve
archCurve.description: SimpleCurve that shapes the vertical component of the arch trajectory over normalized time 0–1.

scalingAnchor.label: Scaling anchor
scalingAnchor.description: Pivot point for scale animations as (x, y, z). Source default is (0.5, 0.5, 0.5).

staticFleck.label: Static fleck
staticFleck.description: A non-moving fleck that fades in, holds, and fades out at a fixed position.

thrownFleck.label: Thrown fleck
thrownFleck.description: A fleck that moves through the world with a speed and optional growth rate.
